{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Golden Crown
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Golden Crown]] is a small, golden pin with the image of a crown that serves as the symbol of the [[Champion’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] wears a golden crown on his head.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
